task.name: Stroop Online
reference_literature: Stroop (1935) Studies of interference in serial verbal reactions
MacLeod (1991) Half a century of research on the Stroop effect
Algom & Chajut (2019) Reclaiming the Stroop effect back from control to input-driven attention and perception

stimuli.description: Word text differs from ink color (incongruent trial) - press first letter of ink color

response.response_key_js: (function(){var s=document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus');if(!s)return null;var c=window.getComputedStyle(s).color;var map={'rgb(255, 0, 0)':'r','rgb(0, 128, 0)':'g','rgb(0, 0, 255)':'b','rgb(255, 255, 0)':'y'};if(map[c])return map[c];var el=s.firstElementChild;if(el){c=window.getComputedStyle(el).color;if(map[c])return map[c];}return null;})()

stimuli.description: Word text matches ink color (congruent trial) - press first letter of ink color

response.response_key_js: (function(){var s=document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus');if(!s)return null;var c=window.getComputedStyle(s).color;var map={'rgb(255, 0, 0)':'r','rgb(0, 128, 0)':'g','rgb(0, 0, 255)':'b','rgb(255, 255, 0)':'y'};if(map[c])return map[c];var el=s.firstElementChild;if(el){c=window.getComputedStyle(el).color;if(map[c])return map[c];}return null;})()

task_specific.notes: Participant presses first letter of ink color (not word). Congruent: word matches color. Incongruent: word differs from color. 15 trials total. Condition determined by comparing word text (textContent) with ink color (computed style). Response key is dynamic per-trial based on ink color.

autocorrelation.rationale: Modest lag-1 autocorrelation (~0.15-0.25) typical in choice RT tasks (Gilden, 2001).

post_error_slowing.rationale: Post-error slowing ~50-100ms typical in Stroop (Rabbitt, 1966; Laming, 1979).

condition_repetition.rationale: Conflict adaptation / Gratton effect: reduced interference after incongruent trials (Gratton et al., 1992).

pink_noise.rationale: 1/f structure in RT series well-documented (Gilden, 2001; Van Orden et al., 2003).

post_interrupt_slowing.rationale: No trial interrupts in this task.

between_subject_jitter.rationale: Individual differences in baseline speed and Stroop magnitude well-documented (MacLeod, 1991).

pilot.rationale: Task has 15 trials with random congruent/incongruent sampling per trial (50/50). Need ~12 trials to reliably observe both conditions given stochastic sampling.

phase_detection.instructions: document.querySelector('.jspsych-instructions-nav') !== null || (document.body && (document.body.textContent.indexOf('Press Space to continue') > -1 || document.body.textContent.indexOf('Press Space to start') > -1))
